content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Boy or Girl". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/236/A
constraints: The length of the string s is between 1 and 100
The string s consists only of lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: A single string s of lowercase English letters

solution.approach: Count the frequency of each character in the string and determine if the number of unique characters is odd or even
